name: @clearline/domain-auth
description: Pure, framework-agnostic authentication & authorization business rules (account-lockout, role→permission mapping, approval authority) — depends only on @clearline/contracts for shared type vocabulary; no data-access or UI dependencies, per the plan's domain-libs-stay-pure architecture.

metadata.scope: First lib in the plan's libs/domain/* group. Holds business rules that must be identical regardless of caller (mock backend service, future real backend) — currently just the 5-attempts-in-15-minutes lockout window.
